intended_use_full: Syngo Carbon Clinicals is intended to provide advanced visualization tools to prepare and process the medical image for evaluation, manipulation and communication of clinical data that was acquired by the medical imaging modalities (for example, CT, MR, etc.) The software package is designed to support technicians and physicians in qualitative and quantitative measurements and in the analysis of clinical data that was acquired by medical imaging modalities.
target_condition: Lesions and lung nodules (oncological evaluation); general radiology conditions
